news.title:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences announces a board meeting on 11th March 2026 to consider fund raising via QIP or rights issue.
The proposal requires shareholder and regulatory approvals, including determination of the issue price.
news.summary:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences announces a board meeting on 11th March 2026 to consider fund raising via QIP or rights issue.
The proposal requires shareholder and regulatory approvals, including determination of the issue price.

news.title:
KIMS reports strong Q3 topline growth; EBITDA growth remains unclear.
Dr. Bhaskar Rao discusses reasons for EBITDA growth not being visible.
news.summary:
KIMS reports strong Q3 topline growth; EBITDA growth remains unclear.
Dr. Bhaskar Rao discusses reasons for EBITDA growth not being visible.

news.title:
Krishna Institute's Q3 EBITDA rose to 199M INR from 187M YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 19.9% from 24.2% YoY.
news.summary:
Krishna Institute's Q3 EBITDA rose to 199M INR from 187M YoY.
EBITDA margin fell to 19.9% from 24.2% YoY.

news.title:
KIMS plans to invest Rs. 100 Cr in Sunshine Hospital, raising its stake beyond 75.53%.
Sunshine Hospital, a KIMS subsidiary, reported FY25 revenue of Rs. 597 Cr.
news.summary:
KIMS plans to invest Rs. 100 Cr in Sunshine Hospital, raising its stake beyond 75.53%.
Sunshine Hospital, a KIMS subsidiary, reported FY25 revenue of Rs. 597 Cr.

news.title:
KIMS to host an investor call on 7th Feb 2026 at 10:30 AM IST with key management.
Call organized by IIFL Capital, focusing on Q3FY26 results and business strategy.
news.summary:
KIMS to host an investor call on 7th Feb 2026 at 10:30 AM IST with key management.
Call organized by IIFL Capital, focusing on Q3FY26 results and business strategy.

news.title: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences' subsidiary received a tax demand notice for ₹124.2M.
news.summary: Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences' subsidiary received a tax demand notice for ₹124.2M.

news.title:
KIMS signs lease for land in Chennai to build 300-bed super speciality hospital.
The expansion aims to enhance KIMS' operations and healthcare services in the region.
news.summary:
KIMS signs lease for land in Chennai to build 300-bed super speciality hospital.
The expansion aims to enhance KIMS' operations and healthcare services in the region.

news.title:
KIMS plans a 300-bed super specialty hospital in Tamil Nadu, investing Rs 300 crore over 36 months.
The stock closed at Rs 639.6, 19.9% below its 52-week high, with a market cap of Rs 25,592.9 crore.
news.summary:
KIMS plans a 300-bed super specialty hospital in Tamil Nadu, investing Rs 300 crore over 36 months.
The stock closed at Rs 639.6, 19.9% below its 52-week high, with a market cap of Rs 25,592.9 crore.

news.title:
KIMS acquires additional 6.94% stake in Sarvejana Healthcare, raising its holding to 75.53%.
The Rs. 148.09 Cr acquisition was completed through cash, enhancing KIMS' strategic investment.
news.summary:
KIMS acquires additional 6.94% stake in Sarvejana Healthcare, raising its holding to 75.53%.
The Rs. 148.09 Cr acquisition was completed through cash, enhancing KIMS' strategic investment.

news.title:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences starts operations at a 350-bed hospital in Bengaluru.
The new facility aims to enhance healthcare services in the region.
news.summary:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences starts operations at a 350-bed hospital in Bengaluru.
The new facility aims to enhance healthcare services in the region.

news.title: Goldman Sachs rates KIMS as 'Buy' with a target price of Rs 900.
news.summary: Goldman Sachs rates KIMS as 'Buy' with a target price of Rs 900.

news.title:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences updates investor presentation due to data errors, impacting occupancy and census metrics.
Revised presentation uploaded; corrections have no financial impact. Investors advised to note changes.
news.summary:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences updates investor presentation due to data errors, impacting occupancy and census metrics.
Revised presentation uploaded; corrections have no financial impact. Investors advised to note changes.

news.title:
KIMS Hospitals plans South India expansion with 5,000+ beds, new hospitals in Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Kerala.
Targets 18-20% growth via specialty diversification, digital health, research; aims for sustainable margin growth.
news.summary:
KIMS Hospitals plans South India expansion with 5,000+ beds, new hospitals in Hyderabad, Bengaluru, Kerala.
Targets 18-20% growth via specialty diversification, digital health, research; aims for sustainable margin growth.

news.title: KIMS Hospitals board approves subsidiary merger to boost operational efficiency.
news.summary: KIMS Hospitals board approves subsidiary merger to boost operational efficiency.

news.title:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd submitted standalone and consolidated financial results for Q2 & H1 FY2025.
Auditor review confirms no material misstatements in compliance with SEBI regulations and Indian Accounting Standards.
news.summary:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd submitted standalone and consolidated financial results for Q2 & H1 FY2025.
Auditor review confirms no material misstatements in compliance with SEBI regulations and Indian Accounting Standards.

news.title:
Krishna Institute merges KIMS and Chalasani Hospitals for operational efficiency.
Subsidiary integration aims to streamline services and improve overall efficiency.
news.summary:
Krishna Institute merges KIMS and Chalasani Hospitals for operational efficiency.
Subsidiary integration aims to streamline services and improve overall efficiency.

news.title:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences reported Q2 revenue of ₹9.6B, up from ₹7.77B YoY.
Revenue growth highlights a strong year-over-year performance for the company.
news.summary:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences reported Q2 revenue of ₹9.6B, up from ₹7.77B YoY.
Revenue growth highlights a strong year-over-year performance for the company.

news.title:
KIMS announces conference call on 10 Nov 2025, 9:00 AM IST hosted by IIFL to discuss Q2FY26 results.
Key participants include Dr. Bhaskara Rao Bollineni, Dr. Abhinay Bollineni, and CFO Sachin Salvi.
news.summary:
KIMS announces conference call on 10 Nov 2025, 9:00 AM IST hosted by IIFL to discuss Q2FY26 results.
Key participants include Dr. Bhaskara Rao Bollineni, Dr. Abhinay Bollineni, and CFO Sachin Salvi.

news.title:
Krishna Institute executed NSE block trade of ~1,003,735 shares at Rs. 716.25.
Transaction value totaled Rs. 71.89 crores, highlighting significant market activity.
news.summary:
Krishna Institute executed NSE block trade of ~1,003,735 shares at Rs. 716.25.
Transaction value totaled Rs. 71.89 crores, highlighting significant market activity.

news.title:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd schedules board meeting on Nov 7, 2025 to review Q2 and H1 unaudited financial results.
Trading window closure effective Oct 1, 2025, until 48 hours post-publication of financial results.
news.summary:
Krishna Institute of Medical Sciences Ltd schedules board meeting on Nov 7, 2025 to review Q2 and H1 unaudited financial results.
Trading window closure effective Oct 1, 2025, until 48 hours post-publication of financial results.
